questionHtml: In this method of producing transgenic plants, state how to detect successful uptake of the gene.
markschemeHtml:
a. antibiotic resistance ✔

b. presence of a marker gene ✔

c. B galactosidase ✔

Accept green fluorescent protein/GFP or other example of a marker gene.
